verses.text: Topa in a heh manin Jerusalem khuapi a mialcipsak hi. A vantung minthan'na teng uh kisiatna a suaksak hi. Amah in a heh ni-in a Biakinnpi nangawn a susia hi
Topa in Judah gama om khuate khempeuh hehpih loin a susia hi. Amah in a galdalna kulhpite khempeuh balzan gawpin a gam leh a gam ukte a maizumsak hi
A hehna tawh Israel-te' thahatnate hong suksiatsak gawp a, gal in a hong sim ciangin amah in eite a hong huh nuam kei hi. Meikuang tawh kibangin eite' langah hong pang a, na khempeuh a susia hi
Amah in galte bangin a thalpi tawh hong ngim a, i lungdamna teng leh i kisaktheihna teng a hong thah khit sak hi. I innsung ciatah a hehna meikuang i mu thei hi
Topa in galte bangin Israel-te a susia hi. Amah in kulhpite leh a kumpi innte a siasa-in a nusia hi. Amah in a bei theilo dahna Judah gamsungah a tungsak hi
Amah in biakna Biakinnpi a zan gawpsak hi. Amah in biakna ni siangtho nite leh Sabbath nite a beisak hi. Kumpite leh siampite in a nasia ama hehna a thuakkhawm uh hi
Topa in a siangtho biakinnpi leh a biakna tau deih nawnlo a, biakinn kulhpi, galte a susiasak hi. Lungdamna tawh amah i biakna munah, amaute gualzo-in a kiko uh hi
Jerusalem kulhpi a kipuk ding Topa in a ngaihsutsa ahi hi. A vekpi-in a kisia khin dingin amah in a sehsa ahi hi. Tausangte leh kulhpite tu-in kisia khin pikpek ta hi

Kulhkongpite cim gawpin lei in vukcip a, kongpi kalhna zawlte a kitan gawp hi. Kumpipa leh miliante salin a om khin uh hi. Thukham kihilh nawnlo a, kamsangte in Pasian kiang pan maang a mu nawn kei uh hi
Jerusalem puteekte pauloin leilakah tu uh a, dahna lim lahna-in puanhampi silhin a lu zang uh leivui a buak uh hi. Jerusalem nungaknote a kun ngelhngalh uh hi
Ka kahkahna-in ka mit paatgawp ta a, ka lungsim gim lua mahmah hi. Ka mite a kisiatna hangin dahin husamin ka bahgawp hi. Naupangte leh nungakte kongzing lakah sibup uh hi
Gilkial dangtakin nu aw, ci-in kapkap uh a, a liam a bai bangin kongzing tengah a tuk pekpak uh hi. Tua bangin damdamin a nute uh ang-ah a si uh hi
Ka it Jerusalem khuapi aw, bangci ding ka hi hiam? Hong bangci hehnep ding ka hi hiam? Nang thuak bangin a thuak kuamah omlo hi. Na tuahsiatna tuipi cia pha a, a lamethuai bangmah om nawnlo hi

Na kamsangte un zuauthu longal thudang gen ding neilo uh a, a thuhilhna uh khemna thu bek ahih manin, a khial na hihlam uh a hong hilhtel kei uh hi. Amaute in lam hong lakkhial uh a, kisikkik theihna ding hun a hong pia kei uh hi

Tua khuapi a siatna a mu mi peuhmah in awi-in a khut a betsan uh hi. A kisia Jerusalem khuapi a muh uh ciangin awi-in a lu uh pei-in a nuihsan uh hi. “Khuapi it-huai i cih hih maw, leitung bup in a kisaktheihpih hih khua maw,” ci-in a nui uh hi
Na galte in nang hong simmawh uh a, muhdahna tawh a hong sik-et uh hi. “Khuapi susiazo ta hang! I suksiatzawh mateng i cihcih niloh mah hi,” ci-in a hagawi uh hi
Topa in a sehsa bangin a tawpkhakna-ah a hong bawl hi. Sauveipi lai-in a hong hilhkholhna bangin hong hehpih nawnloin a hong susia hi. Galte gualzo a, ei hong guallelsak a, amaute a lungdamsak hi
Jerusalem aw, na kulhpite mahmah Topa tungah kikosak in! Sun leh zanin na khitui gun tuiluang bangsak in. Dahna leh kahna tawh na hun beisak in
Zanin tho zelzel in la, Pasian tungah kiko in. Na tate in hehpihna a ngahna dingin na lungsim khempeuh pia in. Kongzing khempeuhah naupangte puksi khin dektak uh hi
Topa aw hong en in. Na bawlsiat mite hong en dih in. Nupite in a it mahmah uh a tate uh' sa ne tanghial uh hi. Siampite leh kamsangte in biakinnpi sung mahmahah thahna thuak uh hi
Khangno leh khanghamte kongzing tengah si uh hi. Galte in nungak leh tangvalte namsau tawh a thatlum uh hi. Amaute hehpih loin na heh ni-in na thatlumsak hi

Kei a hong dipkuasak dingin ka galte pen pawi siim ding bangin na sam a, amaute in hong umcih uh hi. Nangma heh ni-in a suaktazo khat beek a om kei hi. Ka hawmthawh ka it ka tate a hong thahsak uh hi.
